T0106.title: Bird Hooking
T0106.definition: Underground jargon used by fraud rings to mark a potential or successfully hooked victim as a target for ongoing exploitation.
T0106.description: The gang uses this tagging system to categorize and manage victims, allowing them to assign different operators for follow-up and deeper fraud attempts. This assembly-line management enables the gang to efficiently track the progress of a scam and ensure no exploitable target is overlooked. Once marked, the victim faces a continuous and customized series of deceptive attacks.
